# Molecular momentum

## Short Teaching Summary
Molecular momentum: The momentum of an air molecule at room temperature is 3×10−22 kg·ms. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
